data.body: Rebased implementation validated: focused prerequisite/workflow/schema suite 118 passed and make check passed. Broad non-integration run exposed one missing CONTRACT_SCHEMAS registration for the new prerequisite verifier pair; the existing schema-coverage oracle was RED, registration was added, and the focused regression set is now 17 passed. Amended commit 0f284b4ab (same Change-Id I4b52adda9318e3471bb15b426e34a4f79801afa4) pushed as Gerrit change 899: https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/899. Broad non-integration rerun remains active.
